title: Final acceptor reviews V9 readiness dashboard
user_goal: As the final acceptor, open the V9 final dashboard and confirm each stage and each user scenario is PASS, accepted PARTIAL, FAIL or BLOCKED, with claim scan, redaction scan and drawio validation visible.
missing_evidence: V9-5 user scenario PASS or accepted exclusion
Roman Forum debate scenario PASS or accepted PARTIAL
video storyboard workflow scenario PASS or accepted PARTIAL
natural-language workflow optimization scenario PASS or accepted PARTIAL
claim_guard_notes: This scenario must not be counted as V9 final completion while required scenarios are blocked.
redaction_guard_notes: Future final evidence must store redacted refs only.
